mapper.select: SELECT a.homepage_id, a.div_idx, a.div_name, a.col_cnt, b.status_idx, b.rating, b.max_cnt, b.cur_cnt, a.div_print_seq, b.print_seq FROM STATUS_DIV a, STATUS_CNT b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.div_idx = b.div_idx AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY a.div_print_seq ASC, b.print_seq ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STATUS_DIV a, STATUS_CNT b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.div_idx = b.div_idx AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT homepage_id, div_idx, div_name, col_cnt, div_print_seq, add_id, add_date, mod_id, mod_date FROM STATUS_DIV WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY div_print_seq ASC

SELECT a.homepage_id, a.div_idx, a.div_print_seq, status_idx, rating, max_cnt, cur_cnt, print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, b.mod_id, b.mod_date FROM STATUS_DIV a, STATUS_CNT b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.div_idx = b.div_idx AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY div_print_seq ASC, print_seq ASC
SELECT homepage_id, div_idx, status_idx, rating, max_cnt, print_seq, cur_cnt, add_id, add_date, mod_id, mod_date FROM STATUS_CNT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND status_idx = #{status_idx}
SELECT NVL(MAX(div_print_seq), 0)+10 FROM STATUS_DIV WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(div_idx), 0)+1 FROM STATUS_DIV WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO STATUS_DIV ( homepage_id, div_idx, div_name, col_cnt, div_print_seq, add_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{div_idx}, #{div_name}, #{col_cnt}, #{div_print_seq}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE STATUS_DIV SET div_name = #{div_name}, div_print_seq = #{div_print_seq}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND div_idx = #{div_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq), 0)+10 FROM STATUS_CNT WHERE homepage_id=#{homepage_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(status_idx), 0)+1 FROM STATUS_CNT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO STATUS_CNT ( homepage_id, div_idx, status_idx, rating, max_cnt, print_seq, cur_cnt, add_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{div_idx}, #{status_idx}, #{rating}, #{max_cnt}, #{print_seq}, #{cur_cnt}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE STATUS_CNT SET div_idx = #{div_idx}, rating = #{rating}, max_cnt = #{max_cnt}, cur_cnt = #{cur_cnt}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND status_idx = #{status_idx}
UPDATE STATUS_DIV a SET col_cnt=( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STATUS_CNT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND div_idx = a.div_idx ) WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.homepage_id, a.div_idx, div_name, col_cnt, div_print_seq FROM STATUS_DIV a, STATUS_CNT b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.div_idx = b.div_idx AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY a.homepage_id, a.div_idx, div_name, col_cnt, div_print_seq ORDER BY div_print_seq ASC
SELECT SUM(max_cnt) AS max_cnt, SUM(cur_cnt) AS cur_cnt FROM STATUS_CNT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
